visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco retail store with bright overhead lighting. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white blouse under a black vest, stands before a refrigerated display case. She reaches for and opens a transparent glass door, exposing shelves filled with boxed food items. (2) A close-up shot focuses on her hands holding a blue and gold product package labeled 'My Humble House Wasabi Clams.' The packaging is detailed with images of the food and gold-lettered branding. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting, likely a living room, with softer, warmer lighting. Two women sit at a table; the first woman is now accompanied by a second woman with bangs and a teal turtleneck. They hold the same product package toward the camera. (4) Multiple individual transparent plastic sachets of the product are shown spread out on a white marbled surface, revealing the contents of marinated clams and green edamame. (5) One of the women pours the contents of a sachet onto a blue ceramic plate. They then use wooden chopsticks to pick up the food, bringing it close to the camera to show texture, before tasting it. They interact with each other, gesturing with their hands while talking and smiling against a backdrop of a domestic interior with a TV and sofa.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你要買什麼. (2) [Variety]: 蛤. [Slogan]: 寒舍集團 銅板價. 55元山葵花蛤. (3) [Subtitle]: 我要蛤. 拿一個而且它是寒舍集團的哎. (4) [Slogan]: 寒舍集團 山葵烏薩奇. (5) [Subtitle]: 蛤. 蛤. 6入329 總共有6包. 每包是54.8元. (6) [Subtitle]: 竟然55塊就可以在好市多買到寒舍集團的小菜. 山葵花蛤. (7) [Subtitle]: 裡面主要的成分就是花蛤毛豆仁. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後它聞起來雖然有山葵的香味 可是吃起來完全沒有山葵的任何味道或辛辣感. (9) [Subtitle]: 偏甜口的涼拌花蛤配毛豆. (10) [Subtitle]: 咀嚼過後的味道有點像是那個年貨烤魷魚絲的味道. (11) [Subtitle]: 想要當下酒菜鹹鹹的人可能就不搭 可是只需要55塊就可以買到100公克的小菜. (12) [Subtitle]: 真的很方便 也可以試試看喔. 它裡面有6袋 每個單獨包裝真的很棒. (13) [Subtitle]: 很大的肉喔 但是就是甜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators throughout the shopping and review segments.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long black hair and wears a white shirt with a black vest. The second woman has black hair with bangs and wears a teal turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial background shows a large commercial refrigerator at Costco. The later background is a cozy home living room with a television, a grey sofa, and character-themed pillows (BT21).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a female voice speaking in a clear, energetic, and high-pitched tone, asking a question. A brief male-sounding voice replies with a single syllable '蛤' (ha). The sound of a refrigerator door opening creates a metallic and suction-like noise. (2) Upbeat, high-tempo background music with a strong electronic beat and playful percussion begins. A female narrator delivers information about the price and quantity of the product with a fast speech rate and high vocal arousal, showing dynamic pitch variability. (3) The audio environment shifts to an indoor room tone with less reverb. Two female voices engage in a lively conversation, discussing the product's flavor profile. Their speech is characterized by frequent laughter, expressive intonation, and a friendly, informal tone. (4) Distinct sound effects are audible, including the crisp rustling of plastic packets being handled and the subtle clicking of wooden chopsticks against a ceramic plate. The BGM maintains a consistent, joyful energy throughout the review segment, while the vocals remain the primary signal with high clarity and a professional broadcast quality.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a product review and shopping recommendation for 'Wasabi Clams' produced by My Humble House Group and sold at Costco. It aims to inform viewers about the product's cost-effectiveness, packaging convenience, and specific taste characteristics (noting it is sweeter and less spicy than expected).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, pricing, and a detailed taste test review with brand mentions.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media food review editing styles, including text overlays and upbeat music, to engage the audience. The split between the retail setting and the home review provides a complete consumer journey.
